016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
023import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion.HexUtil;
025
026/**
027 * Data class for UnspentOutput as returned by listUnspent RPC
028 * Because the class is immutable we have to give Jackson some hints via annotations.
029 */
030public class UnspentOutput implements UtxoInfo {
031    private final Sha256Hash  txid;
032    private final int         vout;
033    private final Address     address;
034    private final String      label;
035    private final Script      scriptPubKey;
036    private final Coin        amount;
037    private final int         confirmations;
038
039
040    private final String      redeemScript;
041    private final String      witnessScript;
042    private final boolean     spendable;
043    private final boolean     solvable;
044    private final String      desc;
045    private final boolean     safe;
046
047    @JsonCreator
048    public UnspentOutput(@JsonProperty("txid")          Sha256Hash  txid,
049                         @JsonProperty("vout")          int         vout,
050                         @JsonProperty("address")       Address     address,
051                         @JsonProperty("label")         String      label,
052                         @JsonProperty("scriptPubKey")  String      scriptPubKey,
053                         @JsonProperty("amount")        Coin        amount,
054                         @JsonProperty("confirmations") int         confirmations,
055                         @JsonProperty("redeemScript")  String      redeemScript,
056                         @JsonProperty("witnessScript") String      witnessScript,
057                         @JsonProperty("spendable")     boolean     spendable,
058                         @JsonProperty("solvable")      boolean     solvable,
059                         @JsonProperty("desc")          String      desc,
060                         @JsonProperty("safe")          boolean     safe) {
061        this.txid = txid;
062        this.vout = vout;
063        this.address = address;
064        this.label = label;
065        this.scriptPubKey = Script.parse(HexUtil.hexStringToByteArray(scriptPubKey));
066        this.amount = amount;
067        this.confirmations = confirmations;
068        this.redeemScript = redeemScript;
069        this.witnessScript = witnessScript;
070        this.spendable = spendable;
071        this.solvable = solvable;
072        this.desc = desc;
073        this.safe = safe;
074    }
075
076    public Sha256Hash getTxid() {
077        return txid;
078    }
079
080    public int getVout() {
081        return vout;
082    }
083
084    public Address getAddress() {
085        return address;
086    }
087
088    public String getLabel() {
089        return label;
090    }
091
092    public Script getScriptPubKey() {
093        return scriptPubKey;
094    }
095
096    public Coin getAmount() {
097        return amount;
098    }
099
100    public int getConfirmations() {
101        return confirmations;
102    }
103
104    public String getRedeemScript() {
105        return redeemScript;
106    }
107
108    public String getWitnessScript() {
109        return witnessScript;
110    }
111
112    public boolean isSpendable() {
113        return spendable;
114    }
115
116    public boolean isSolvable() {
117        return solvable;
118    }
119
120    public String getDesc() {
121        return desc;
122    }
123
124    public boolean isSafe() {
125        return safe;
126    }
127}
